\tzpentry{ID5654}{Propagator Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5654 introduces Propagator Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} v_{\rm rel} \lesssim v_{\rm esc} = \sqrt{\frac{2G(m_1+m_2)}{R_1+R_2}}. \end{equation}
